judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinsing steps and the do-not-stop warning are correct and in line with the source. However, escalation is overgeneralized as immediate medical advice, while the structured truth specifies seeking medical attention if symptoms persist after rinsing or exposure was substantial.
